title: Cancelled Action Rejection

summaryCharacteristics: Mentions database migration script discussion and the decision to cancel it due to D1 migration

requiredDecisions.description: Migrate to Cloudflare D1 managed database directly
requiredDecisions.evidence: we decided to migrate to the Cloudflare D1 managed database directly

prohibitedOutputCharacteristics: Including the database migration script in proposedActions when it was explicitly cancelled

scoringNotes: Verify that the database migration script task is NOT emitted. The actions array must be empty.
assumptions: An action item proposed and subsequently cancelled in the same conversation must not be extracted.
